name: technical_skills_offering
description: Light-touch external-facing technical skills offering website.

scripts.generate:data: npm run generate:objectives && npm run generate:catalog
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/data dist/assets && cp index.html styles.css main.js learning_objectives.md course_list.md dist/ && cp data/learning_objectives.json data/course_catalog.json dist/data/ && cp assets/exeter_logo.png dist/assets/
